validation_rows.label: Overall validation status
validation_rows.detail: Combined metadata, mapping, namespace, and SHACL status.

validation_rows.label: Missing definitions
validation_rows.detail: Release-time missing definitions or comments after enrichment.

validation_rows.label: Namespace violations
validation_rows.detail: Violations against the active namespace policy.

validation_rows.label: Mapping issues
validation_rows.detail: Mappings that conflict with local term typing.

validation_rows.label: OWL consistency hook
validation_rows.detail: owlready2 is not installed; OWL consistency loading and reasoner hooks were skipped.

validation_rows.label: EMMO checks
validation_rows.detail: EMMOntoPy is not installed; optional EMMO convention checks were skipped.

validation_rows.label: OOPS! hook
validation_rows.detail: OOPS! integration is configured but disabled by default for offline-safe local releases.

validation_rows.label: FOOPS! hook
validation_rows.detail: FOOPS! integration is configured but disabled by default for offline-safe local releases.

hygiene_rows.label: Preferred prefix in public table
hygiene_rows.detail: Public docs normalize the preferred namespace prefix for the local ontology.

hygiene_rows.label: Placeholder-style definitions
hygiene_rows.detail: Generated definitions that still need expert editorial review.

hygiene_rows.label: Imports declared in schema
hygiene_rows.detail: Imported ontologies explicitly declared in the schema module.

hygiene_rows.label: Configured import sources
hygiene_rows.detail: Configured primary, fallback, and optional reuse targets for the release.

recommendations: Prioritize expert review of generated placeholder definitions before treating the release as a mature public vocabulary.
Audit source content to remove local file-based namespace leakage before external publication.
Review unmapped controlled vocabulary rows to decide which terms should remain local and which need better external alignment.
